allow: Bash(powershell.exe -NoProfile -Command "node -e ""const icons = require\(''@carbon/icons-react''\); const matches = Object.keys\(icons\).filter\(k => k.toLowerCase\(\).includes\(''present''\)\); console.log\(matches.join\(''\\n''\)\);""")
